nodes.name: static-index-html.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a utility function to read and apply UI branding to the static index.html served by the server, replacing default placeholders with brand-specific values.

nodes.name: readBrandedStaticIndexHtml
nodes.summary: Reads the compiled UI index.html from the given distribution path and applies branding transformations before returning the content as a string.

nodes.name: company-export.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer implementing company data export/portability, serializing agents, goals, routines, and settings into a portable archive format. (File not found in current repository state.)

nodes.name: company-import.ts
nodes.summary: Service layer handling company data import and restoration, deserializing portable archives and recreating agents, goals, routines, and settings. (File not found in current repository state.)

nodes.name: heartbeat.ts
nodes.summary: Core heartbeat service managing the entire agent run lifecycle — processing run events, resolving adapter configurations, handling transient retries, billing, model profiles, workspace management, and wake context enrichment for agent execution.
nodes.languageNotes: Extremely large service (91 functions, 34 exports) acting as the central nervous system for agent run processing with extensive functional decomposition.

nodes.name: heartbeatService
nodes.summary: Main heartbeat service factory function encapsulating the full agent run orchestration logic: receiving run events from adapters, updating run state, managing retries, billing, workspace lifecycle, and issue wake coordination.

nodes.name: resolveExecutionRunAdapterConfig
nodes.summary: Resolves the complete adapter configuration for an execution run, merging workspace settings, model profiles, skill keys, and runtime environment bindings.

nodes.name: resolveModelProfileApplication
nodes.summary: Determines which model profile to apply for an agent run based on agent runtime config, wake context, and available profiles, implementing profile selection logic.

nodes.name: buildPaperclipWakePayload
nodes.summary: Constructs the full wake payload passed to the agent adapter when an agent run is triggered, assembling context snapshots, task descriptions, permissions, and session parameters.

nodes.name: resolveRuntimeSessionParamsForWorkspace
nodes.summary: Computes the runtime session parameters for an agent execution workspace, including compaction policy, model profile, and workspace-specific configuration overrides.

nodes.name: enrichWakeContextSnapshot
nodes.summary: Enriches a wake context snapshot with resolved blocker information, issue references, and agent configuration needed to construct a complete agent invocation context.

nodes.name: ensureManagedProjectWorkspace
nodes.summary: Creates or retrieves a managed project workspace for a run, provisioning git-backed execution environments when they do not yet exist.

nodes.name: computeBoundedTransientHeartbeatRetrySchedule
nodes.summary: Calculates exponential backoff retry schedule for transient heartbeat failures, applying jitter and upper bounds to prevent thundering herd.

nodes.name: resolveLedgerScopeForRun
nodes.summary: Determines the billing ledger scope (company, goal, or agent) for a given run to associate costs with the correct budget entity.

nodes.name: buildPaperclipTaskMarkdown
nodes.summary: Renders a structured Markdown representation of the current agent task including issue details, goals, blockers, and context for inclusion in the agent wake payload.

nodes.name: board-auth.ts
nodes.summary: Service providing board authentication operations including API token hashing, CLI auth challenge management, token creation and expiry, and the central boardAuthService factory for managing board access credentials.

nodes.name: boardAuthService
nodes.summary: Main board authentication service factory implementing token lifecycle management: creating, rotating, listing, and verifying board API keys and CLI auth challenge flows.

nodes.name: resource-memberships.ts
nodes.summary: Service managing resource membership policies for companies, evaluating access control rules and maintaining membership records for board and workspace resources.

nodes.name: resourceMembershipService
nodes.summary: Main resource membership service factory that manages CRUD operations for resource memberships, evaluating policies and enforcing access rules for company resources.

nodes.name: evaluatePolicy
nodes.summary: Evaluates membership access policy rules for a given resource and user, determining allowed actions based on configured policy configuration.
